original_image_tags: A scanned document page, appearing to be the reverse side of a typed or carbon-copied sheet. The paper is off-white with a textured grain. Two black hole-punch marks are visible at the top. The main body of the page shows faint, reversed, and highly degraded bleed-through text from the obverse side, which is largely illegible. At the bottom of the page, there is a clear, purple-ink stamp.

elements.description: Reverse side of a document with visible bleed-through of typed text from the other side. Two hole-punch marks at the top. An inverted purple stamped text at the bottom reads 'TRANSMITTED DEC 13 3 53 PM '48'.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific stamp text ('TRANSMITTED DEC 13 3 53 PM '48') while Description A states the stamp is unreadable and only describes its color and location, creating a direct contradiction on the visual content of the stamp.
